theme_notes: Taglines riff on: the jury's Ticketmaster/Live Nation illegal-monopoly verdict (overcharged fans by $1.72/ticket), the US-Iran war and Strait of Hormuz blockade driving surging jet fuel costs and worldwide airline cancellations, Bayern Munich's dramatic 4-3 comeback to eliminate Real Madrid in the Champions League quarterfinals, PSG's cold-blooded 4-0 elimination of Liverpool, Pope Leo XIV marking one year as the first American pope, and the IMF slashing 2026 global growth forecasts to 3.1%.
settled: Balance: zero. Rarer than a Ticketmaster fee waiver.
You're square. The IMF didn't forecast this either.
Settled. Bayern and Real Madrid couldn't manage it this cleanly.
youOwe: Less than a Ticketmaster 'convenience fee.' Still somehow your fault.
Pocket change. Even Russia would let this one slide.
The Strait of Hormuz is more resolved than your tab right now.
Small enough to ghost. Too big to pretend it was a gift.
Bayern paid more for their Munich hotel than this. Show some ambition.
The jury found Live Nation guilty. Your finances are next on the docket.
Real money, owed to someone who knows your schedule.
You've monopolized not paying people back. The jury has noted it.
Congress blocked the war powers vote. Your payment is equally AWOL.
Pope Leo would call this a moral failing. He would not be wrong.
PSG eliminated Liverpool for free. You can't eliminate a dinner tab.
Almost a grand. You've entered geopolitical incident territory.
Four figures. The IMF downgraded global growth. You're also downgraded.
At this level you're not a partner. You're a sanctions violation.
Jet fuel is surging because of Iran. Your debt is surging because of you.
Russia launched 200 drones this week. You've launched zero repayments.
The Strait of Hormuz is blocked. Your financial credibility: also blocked.
This is Ticketmaster-tier extraction. You have become what you hate.
theyOwe: Under fifty. Accept it as tribute and move on.
Pope Leo forgives. You have that option too, technically.
Technically owed. Emotionally, it's already gone.
They owe you what Bayern scored against Real Madrid. In dollars.
Not enough for a confrontation. Just enough for a loaded silence.
Ticketmaster overcharged $1.72 a ticket and got convicted. Context.
You could book a flight. Except airlines are canceling routes over Iran.
Their debt has a resting pulse now. It's a living thing.
The jury found Live Nation guilty of this exact energy, basically.
Pope Leo says forgive. You are not the Pope.
Champions League drama, except it's your grocery bill.
The IMF cut global growth to 3.1%. Your trust is also trending down.
You're not a partner anymore. You're a creditor nation.
They owe you enough for a round-trip flight. Too bad the Strait of Hormuz is a mess.
The IMF would demand structural reforms. You should also demand structural reforms.
Russia launched fewer drones than your partner has issued excuses.
Five figures. Ticketmaster illegally overcharged less. Think about that.
The House rejected a resolution to end this. Guess you'll have to do it yourself.
